markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content production, strategy, and future planning.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** A two-track strategy will separate high-volume, broad educational content (for traffic) from targeted, technical content (for ICPs), with the former getting a lighter review.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [**"Education Hub" Launch:** A new "EDU" tag will launch this week to segment GrowthX content in the CMS for a future "Education Hub" migration, enabling easier content management.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [**Strategic Alignment:** Content will support key FY27 goals, including 100% YoY growth in the Public Sector (K-12, Fed/State) and the launch of new industry solution pages.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [**Renewal Meeting Set:** A meeting is scheduled for Jan 28 to finalize the renewal strategy, focusing on aligning SEO with company initiatives and setting clear goals.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Review

  - [**Production Pipeline:** 18 articles are in production (NetNew & webinar repurposing) to front-load content before the upcoming website freeze.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**High-Intent Content:** Four articles targeting "Sublime alternatives" are being created to capture bottom-funnel traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [**Review Bottleneck:** Emily's review queue is long. Emily will prioritize reviews this week and is also developing a template for the future "Education" section.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)

### New Content Strategy: Blog vs. Education Hub

  - [**Rationale:** The new strategy addresses past internal blockers by creating a clear path for different content types.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)
  - [**Two-Track Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [**Education Hub:** High-volume, broad content (e.g., K-12 cybersecurity) for general traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
          - [**Review Process:** Lighter editorial review.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=2532.0)
          - [**CTAs:** Contextual links to relevant Abnormal pages (e.g., industry solutions).](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
      - [**Blog:** Targeted, technical content for ICPs.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
          - [**Review Process:** Thorough review by Emily and Kali.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
          - [**CTAs:** Stronger, direct calls to action (e.g., "Get a Demo").](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=2406.0)
  - [**Action Item:** Jo will draft initial definitions for "Blog" vs. "Education Hub" content for team iteration.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)

### CMS Migration & Content Tagging

  - [**Interim Solution:** An "EDU" tag will be added to all GrowthX content in the CMS to prepare for the future "Education Hub" migration.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [**Migration Plan:** Meaghan is deciding whether to migrate all content and then unpublish, or to filter first.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [**Unpublished Content:** Emily will work with Kali to create a definitive list of content to be permanently unpublished vs. content to be republished under the new "EDU" tag.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)

### FY27 Strategic Alignment

  - [**Key Initiatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
      - [**Public Sector Growth:** Support the goal of 100% YoY revenue growth in the Public Sector (K-12, Fed/State, Higher Ed).](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
      - [**New Industry Pages:** Create content to support the launch of new "Solutions by Industry" pages (e.g., Education, Retail/E-commerce, Healthcare).](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
      - [**Product Focus:** Support new products like "AI Phishing Coach."](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:** Publish content supporting these initiatives *before* integrated campaigns launch to build topical authority and drive baseline traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Webinar Repurposing & Lead Gen

  - [**Traffic Projections:** For planning purposes, Abdallah can model a 5–10% traffic capture rate from the total search volume of webinar topics.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Expect a 3-month lag for new content to rank, with results becoming visible by the end of Q2.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)
  - [**Lead Gen Experiment:** Begin experimenting with stronger, contextual CTAs in high-intent articles (e.g., competitor comparisons) to test lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=2264.0)
  - [**Web Team Handoff:** The primary goal remains driving high-volume traffic to put pressure on the web team to improve on-site conversion paths (e.g., pop-ups, chat).](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=2345.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=2725.0)
      - [Send calendar invite for the Jan 28 renewal meeting (12:30 PM PT) to Abdallah and Warren.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=2735.0)
      - [Draft initial definitions for "Blog" vs. "Education Hub" content.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research to support the new "Solutions by Industry" pages.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)
  - [**Emily:**](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [Prioritize and complete outstanding content reviews by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [Work with Kali to create a definitive list of content for permanent unpublishing.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [**Meaghan:**](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [Decide and communicate the final CMS migration plan (filter vs. migrate all).](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [**Abdallah:**](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
      - [Model webinar repurposing traffic projections for FY27 planning.](https://fathom.video/share/MmgwTcguHhxC6DgzyiNXkPbaqxyXzTGo?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
